values.name: mail.followers.form
values.arch:
<form string="Followers Form">
                    <sheet>
                        <group>
                            <group>
                                <field name="res_model"/>
                                <field name="partner_id"/>
                            </group>
                            <group>
                                <field name="res_id"/>
                                <field name="subtype_ids" widget="many2many_tags"/>
                            </group>
                        </group>
                    </sheet>
                </form>
